steps.title: Welcome to Poseidon
steps.body: Poseidon is CTI Group's unified command center. It houses every division: Master + Forecast, Finance, Recruiting, Processing (CUK), J1 Division, IT & Tech, J1 Housing, plus supporting workspaces (Tasks, Calendar, Videos, Projects, Partners, Settings).

steps.title: The Sidebar
steps.body: All navigation lives here. Seven primary divisions at the top, seven workspace tools below. On mobile, tap the menu icon (top-left) to open this drawer.

steps.title: Header Controls
steps.body: Global search, Microsoft 365 connect button, and the dark/light toggle live here. The page title changes as you navigate.

steps.title: Master + Forecast
steps.body: Your executive view. Consolidated KPIs across every division, forecasted placements, revenue by division, regional hub pipeline, and quarterly milestone tracking. Click Update Dashboard to pull fresh data; Simulate Week to project forward; What-If to run scenarios.

steps.title: Finance
steps.body: Revenue, costs, P&L, and forecasting. The toolbar (Update · Simulate · What-If · Import · Export · PDF) is consistent across every division — learn it once, use it everywhere.

steps.title: Recruiting
steps.body: Candidate pipelines for J1 and Cruise divisions. Generate recruiting markdowns, manage stages, and track conversion rates. Connects to Zoho Recruit when configured.

steps.title: Processing (CUK)
steps.body: Document processing, visa tracking, and case management. This is your back-office operations hub.

steps.title: J1 Division
steps.body: Full J-1 Cultural Exchange program management: sponsors (CIEE, Intrax, Alliance), participants, host employers, consulates. The Surabaya consulate briefing lives here.

steps.title: J1 Housing
steps.body: Manage participant housing end-to-end. Paste PDF housing documents and Poseidon's parser extracts options automatically (move-in dates, rent, utilities, deposits, amenities). Save accommodations per employer/region.

steps.title: Video Studio
steps.body: Generate recruiting videos from intake forms. ElevenLabs voiceovers, Storyblocks B-roll, Remotion/ffmpeg rendering. Click Generate Brief to auto-produce a scene-by-scene script.

steps.title: Tasks
steps.body: Personal + team task list, persisted to localStorage. Create with the + button. Jarvis can add tasks by voice command.

steps.title: Calendar
steps.body: Month / week / day views. Syncs with Microsoft 365 once connected. Jarvis will read your morning schedule aloud.

steps.title: Jarvis — Voice Assistant
steps.body: Click the floating Jarvis button (bottom-right) anywhere to talk. Powered by Grok Voice. Jarvis reads the live dashboard, knows your tasks & calendar, and can execute commands: 'Add a task', 'What's my day look like?', 'Go to Finance', 'Brief me.'

steps.title: Directory
steps.body: Every link, sub-program, and integration in one place. Click the Directory icon in the header to search/filter by category.

steps.title: Version & Changelog
steps.body: See current version, release dates, and categorized changelog. New features, patches, and upgrades always visible.

steps.title: Settings
steps.body: Dark/light theme, API keys (Grok, ElevenLabs, MSAL), and advanced configuration. Restart this training anytime from here.

steps.title: You're ready.
steps.body: That's the tour. This training will re-run when new features ship. You can always restart it from Settings → Replay Onboarding. Welcome aboard.
